rules.label: Minimum thickness
rules.annotation: Mark minimum thickness location and value when available.

rules.label: Thinning ratio
rules.annotation: Mark high-thinning zones and record whether values exceed project limits.

rules.label: FLD risk
rules.annotation: Mark split, necking, or critical FLD regions when visible.

rules.label: Springback deviation
rules.annotation: Record positive and negative deviation zones separately when available.

rules.label: Maximum force
evidence: process force result or curve screenshot
rules.annotation: Record peak force and corresponding operation or increment when available.

rules.label: Material flow abnormality
rules.annotation: Mark asymmetric draw-in, abnormal flow, or visible skid-line risk.

annotation_rules.unknown_value_policy: If a numeric or category value is not visible in available evidence, report unknown and keep the rule out of pass/fail scoring.

required_user_inputs: material and nominal thickness if thresholds depend on material
minimum thickness pass, warning and fail limits
maximum thinning pass, warning and fail limits
FLD category mapping for pass, warning and fail
springback deviation pass, warning and fail limits
maximum force pass, warning and fail limits
material flow or draw-in abnormality category mapping
one accepted historical report if wording or annotation style must match an existing standard
